description_long: This is a modern table lamp featuring a cylindrical fabric lampshade in a light, neutral color. The shade sits atop a slender, vertical metal rod that is anchored into a square, flat base, which appears to be made of a dark, possibly wooden or metal material. The lamp's stem includes a decorative wooden accent, adding a touch of warmth and contrast to the otherwise minimalist design. The overall silhouette is clean and geometric, with no visible switches or cords from these views. The lamp is compact and designed for placement on a table or desk, suitable for both residential and commercial urban interiors. Its understated style allows it to blend seamlessly into contemporary environments.
description: A modern table lamp with a cylindrical fabric shade, slender metal stem, and a square base with a wooden accent. The design is minimalist and suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical fabric shade, straight stem, and square base with the wooden accent visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the wooden accent now more centered, maintaining the clear view of the shade and base.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the wooden accent shifting slightly to the right side of the stem.
description_view_3: Rear view with the wooden accent now directly behind the stem, showing the symmetry of the lamp's design.
